title: Flamingo - Software update for just charge case
scenario: Software Update screen allows updating only the charging case firmware without updating the headset when both have available DFU updates
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Locate your connected device and tap the Update button on the device card.
3. On the Software Update tab, confirm that 'Update All' is displayed at the top, and separate 'Update' buttons are shown for both the headset and the charging case.
4. Tap the 'Update' button next to the charging case.
5. Complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the charging case.
6. After the update completes, verify the firmware version of the charging case has been updated.
7. Verify that the headset firmware version remains unchanged (still on its previous firmware).
expected: Only the charging case firmware is updated; the headset remains on its current firmware version.
